sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(u1.id) FROM sys_user_t u1 LEFT OUTER JOIN sys_basic_msg_t b2 on u1.departmentid=b2.id WHERE u1.validflag > 0
(u1.staffName like '%$staffName$%' or u1.usercode like '%$staffName$%')
u1.departmentid = $departmentid$
u1.roleid = $roleid$

SELECT u1.*, IFNULL( r.msgFilter, 0 ) AS msgFilter, IFNULL( r.fieldFilter, 0 ) AS fieldFilter, d.departname as departname, o.roleName as rolename FROM sys_user_t u1 LEFT JOIN sys_role_t r ON u1.roleid = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d on u1.departmentid=d.id LEFT JOIN sys_role_t o on u1.roleid=o.id where u1.validflag>0
(u1.staffName like '%$staffName$%' or u1.usercode like '%$staffName$%')
u1.departmentid = $departmentid$
u1.roleid = $roleid$
ORDER BY u1.departmentid
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_t (usercode,userpassword,staffName,sexes,cardnumber,alarmsignal,contactnumber,roleid,departmentid,dpName,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ('$usercode$','$userpassword$','$staffName$','$sexes$','$cardnumber$','$alarmsignal$','$contactnumber$',$roleid$,$departmentid$,'$dpName$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_user_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE sys_user_t SET validflag =$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE sys_user_t SET usercode = '$usercode$',staffName = '$staffName$', sexes = '$sexes$', cardnumber = '$cardnumber$', alarmsignal = '$alarmsignal$', contactnumber = '$contactnumber$', roleid=$roleid$,dpName='$dpName$',departmentid=$departmentid$,before_departmentid=$before_departmentid$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(id,COUNT(id)) FROM sys_user_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND usercode = '$usercode$'
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM sys_user_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND usercode = '$usercode$' AND userpassword = '$userpassword$'

SELECT u1.*, IFNULL( r.msgFilter, 0 ) AS msgFilter, IFNULL( r.fieldFilter, 0 ) AS fieldFilter, IFNULL( r.eventFilter, 0 ) AS eventFilter, d.departname as departname,d.departcode FROM sys_user_t u1 LEFT JOIN sys_role_t r ON u1.roleid = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d on u1.departmentid=d.id where u1.validflag>0 AND u1.usercode = '$usercode$' AND u1.userpassword = '$userpassword$'
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user_t u WHERE u.validflag > 0 AND u.id = $id$
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user_t u WHERE u.validflag > 0 AND u.cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user_t u WHERE u.validflag > 0 AND u.departmentid = $departmentid$

SELECT u.* FROM sys_user_t u WHERE u.validflag > 0 AND u.departmentid = $departmentid$
u.id NOT IN ($departname$)
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user_t u WHERE u.validflag > 0 AND u.id IN ($departname$)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_user_t SET userpassword = '$userpassword$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT a.*,b.ID AS roleuserId FROM sys_user_t a RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT userId,ID FROM sys_role_user_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND roleId = $roleid$ ) b ON a.id = b.userId WHERE a.validflag > 0
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user_t u left join sys_department_t d on u.departmentid=d.id WHERE u.validflag > 0 and d.validflag>0 AND d.id IN ($departname$)
